title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and async wrapper; chat, stream, embeddings, model management with native asyncio support.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration wrapping Ollama’s local models for chains, agents, retrieval QA, and tool use.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs, streaming, and embeddings utilities.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API; supports chat, generate, pull, and list operations.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama.cpp wrapper)
summary: Early Go wrapper around go-llama.cpp that evolved into the official Ollama project; still referenced in forks.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds a local AI copilot powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & CUDA) and compose examples for running Ollama containerized.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, chat, and embeddings support; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed APIs and async streaming for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight React chatbot frontend that talks to a local Ollama instance via REST.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that integrates Ollama models into Slack channels with streaming replies.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to call Ollama models inside workflows (chat, generate, embed).

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Experimental Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers as part of CI/CD pipelines for AI-powered tests.

title: ollama-models-hub
summary: Official registry of ready-to-run Modelfiles (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.) maintained by Ollama team.
